---
title: "Quarto Basics"
format:
  html:
    # table of contents
    toc: true
execute:
  # makes code chunks invisible in the output
  # code output is still visible though
  echo: false
  # hides warnings in the output
  warning: false
# native julia engine
engine: julia
---

# Title

## Section Header

```{julia}
println("hello world")
```

```{julia}
largura = 5
altura = 10
area = altura * largura
println("The area is $area")
```

----------------------------------------------
inside a codeblock
#| output: FALSE (ommits the cell output)
#| echo: FALSE (ommits the cell code)


-----------------------
H~2~0 (~ serve como _ em latex)


-----------------------
## Problem 1

**(a)** State and prove the result.


::: {.callout-tip}
This is a note.
:::

::: {.callout-note}
Here is the solution.

We start by noting that...
:::

::: {.callout-important}
**Solution**
:::
